title: Battle of Excarga
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Attack on Kashyyyk|Incursion on Kashyyyk]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |conc= |next=*[[Hunt for the Decimator]]''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Dark Reaper crisis]] |image= |name=Battle of Excarga |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]''[[Boba Fett: Crossfire]]'' |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] (within a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]]) |place=[[Excarga/Legends|Excarga]] |result=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] victory |side1=Confederacy of Independent Systems |side2=*[[Excargan]]s *Galactic Republic |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=[[Garr]]'s [[Garr's mother|mother]] and [[Garr's father|father]] are taken [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] }} {{Quote|Where were you, uh, picked up?''"
"''Excarga. My parents are ore traders. When the Separatists arrived to take control of our ore-processing facilities, they took everyone prisoner, so my parents hid me. Later, when the Republic counterattacked, they picked me up, but I couldn't find my parents.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Garr]]|}} Less than a [[Standard month/Legends|month]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] '''invaded''' the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Excarga/Legends|Excarga]] after discovering the valuable [[Ore/Legends|ore]]. [[Garr]]'s parents were separated from him in the battle, and the Separatists took control of the planet's ore-processing facilities and took everybody on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]]. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] soon counter-attacked, driving out the Separatist invaders and freeing the majority of the prisoners. {{Battle-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Boba Fett: Crossfire]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Erste Schlacht von Excarga }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Excarga, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Excarga]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]] [[Category:Invasions]]
